positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~chemical(mixture)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~only_one(mixture)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~only_one(X0) | ~chemical(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define organic(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u23,axiom,
    ~chemical(mixture)).

cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~only_one(mixture)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~only_one(X0) | ~chemical(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define organic(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define hydrocarbon(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define alkane(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define contains_carbon(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
